sector: Apparel Design, Pattern Making & Fashion Technology

modules.module_title: Module 1: Introduction to Textile Fibers (Natural Fibers)
Module 2: Introduction to Textile Fibers (Man-made & Synthetic Fibers)
Module 6: Fabric Care, Quality Control & Sustainability

questions.question: Which natural fiber is known as 'Queen of Fibers' for its luxurious feel and sheen?
questions.explanation: Silk apni shandaar chamak aur soft feel ke liye 'Queen of Fibers' kehlata hai.

questions.question: Kapas (Cotton) kis source se milta hai?
questions.explanation: Cotton plants se milne wala ek natural cellulosic fiber hai.

questions.question: Linen fiber kis plant se extract kiya jata hai?
questions.explanation: Linen fiber flax plant ke stem se nikalte hain.

questions.question: Which natural fiber is known for its warmth and excellent insulation properties, often used in sweaters?
questions.explanation: Wool apni garmahat aur insulating properties ke liye jaana jata hai, jo use thand ke kapdon ke liye ideal banata hai.

questions.question: Cotton fabric ki kaun si property use summer wear ke liye suitable banati hai?
questions.explanation: Cotton breathable aur absorbent hota hai, isliye garmiyon mein pehne ke liye comfortable hota hai.

questions.question: Degumming process kis natural fiber ke production mein use hota hai, jismein sericin ko remove kiya jata hai?
questions.explanation: Silk ke production mein degumming ek important step hai, jismein raw silk se sericin (natural gum) ko hataya jata hai.

questions.question: Which fiber shrinks when exposed to hot water and agitation?
questions.explanation: Wool garam paani aur ragad se shrink ho jaati hai, jise felting kehte hain.

questions.question: Kon sa natural fiber apni high strength aur luster ke liye jaana jata hai, aur often expensive dress materials mein use hota hai?
questions.explanation: Silk apni mazbooti aur chamak ke liye famous hai, aur luxurious garments mein use hota hai.

questions.question: Which of the following is a bast fiber?
questions.explanation: Linen flax plant ke stem (bast) se milta hai.

questions.question: Cotton fiber ko stronger banane ke liye kaun sa chemical treatment use kiya jata hai, jo uski luster bhi badhata hai?
questions.explanation: Mercerization cotton ko strength, luster aur dye uptake improve karta hai.

questions.question: Wool fiber ki 'crimp' property ka kya benefit hai?
questions.explanation: Wool ke fibers mein natural crimp hota hai, jo air pockets create karta hai aur excellent insulation provide karta hai.

questions.question: Which natural fiber is prone to moth damage?
questions.explanation: Wool protein fiber hai aur moths isko damage kar sakte hain.

questions.question: Silk worms kis plant ke leaves par feed karte hain primarily?
questions.explanation: Silk worms primarily mulberry leaves par feed karte hain.

questions.question: Fabric jismein cotton aur linen mix hote hain, usko kya kehte hain?
questions.explanation: Jab do ya do se zyada fibers ko milakar yarn banate hain, use blend kehte hain.

questions.question: Retting process kis natural fiber ko extract karne ke liye use hota hai?
questions.explanation: Retting ek process hai jismein flax plant ke stem ko paani mein soak karke fibers ko alag kiya jata hai.

questions.question: Jo natural fiber cellulosic hota hai, aur plants se milta hai, uska example kya hai?
questions.explanation: Cotton ek cellulosic natural fiber hai jo plant se milta hai.

questions.question: Sericulture kis natural fiber ke production se related hai?
questions.explanation: Sericulture, silk worms ko paalna aur unse silk produce karna hai.

questions.question: Which man-made fiber is regenerated cellulosic fiber, often called 'artificial silk'?
questions.explanation: Rayon ek regenerated cellulosic fiber hai jise uski chamak ke kaaran 'artificial silk' bhi kehte hain.

questions.question: Synthetic fibers generally kis property ke liye jaane jaate hain?
questions.explanation: Synthetic fibers jaise polyester aur nylon wrinkle-resistant hote hain aur jaldi sookh jaate hain.

questions.question: Which synthetic fiber is commonly used in activewear and swimwear due to its elasticity and strength?
questions.explanation: Spandex (Lycra) apni excellent elasticity aur strength ke liye activewear aur swimwear mein use hota hai.

questions.question: Nylon fiber ki production process mein kaun sa monomer use hota hai?
questions.explanation: Nylon 6 ke liye caprolactam aur Nylon 6,6 ke liye adipic acid aur hexamethylenediamine use hote hain. Caprolactam ek common monomer hai.

questions.question: Polyester fabric ki main drawback kya hai as compared to cotton?
questions.explanation: Polyester cotton ke मुकाबले kam breathable aur absorbent hota hai, jisse garmi mein uncomfortable lag sakta hai.

questions.question: Acrylic fiber kis natural fiber ka substitute hai mainly?
questions.explanation: Acrylic fiber ko 'synthetic wool' bhi kehte hain kyunki uski properties wool se milti-julti hain, jaise warmth aur softness.

questions.question: Viscose Rayon ko banane ke liye kaun sa raw material use hota hai?
questions.explanation: Viscose Rayon wood pulp (cellulose) se banta hai, jo ek regenerated fiber hai.

questions.question: Microfibers kya hote hain?

options.A: Fibers jo bahut mote hote hain.
options.B: Fibers jinhe natural sources se extract kiya jata hai.
options.C: Fibers jo bahut fine hote hain, often synthetic, used for softness and drape.
options.D: Fibers jo sirf industrial use ke liye hote hain.

questions.explanation: Microfibers bahut hi fine synthetic fibers hote hain, jo fabrics ko softness, drape aur water-repellent properties dete hain.

questions.question: Jo fiber petroleum-based chemicals se banate hain, unhe kya kehte hain?
questions.explanation: Synthetic fibers jaise polyester, nylon, acrylic petroleum-based chemicals se banate hain.

questions.question: Acetate fiber ek man-made fiber hai. Iski main property kya hai jo ise drapes aur linings ke liye suitable banati hai?
questions.explanation: Acetate apne luxurious feel aur excellent drape ke liye jaana jata hai, isliye linings aur decorative fabrics mein use hota hai.

questions.question: Which synthetic fiber is known for its high strength and elasticity, commonly used in hosiery and ropes?
questions.explanation: Nylon apni high strength aur elasticity ke liye jaana jata hai.

questions.question: Fire-resistant garments ke liye kaun sa fiber use ho sakta hai?
questions.explanation: Modacrylic fibers inherently flame-retardant hote hain aur protective clothing mein use hote hain.

questions.question: Lyocell (Tencel) kaun se fiber category mein aata hai?
questions.explanation: Lyocell ek regenerated cellulosic fiber hai jo sustainable process se wood pulp se banta hai.

questions.question: Polyester ko aksar cotton ke saath blend kyun kiya jata hai?

options.C: To improve wrinkle resistance and durability

questions.explanation: Polyester ko cotton ke saath blend karne se fabric ki wrinkle resistance aur durability badhti hai.

questions.question: Spandex (Lycra) ki ek important property kya hai jo stretch fabrics mein use hoti hai?
questions.explanation: Spandex apni high elasticity aur recovery ke liye jaana jata hai, jo use stretch garments ke liye ideal banata hai.

questions.question: Which fiber is generally thermoplastic, meaning it can be heat-set?
questions.explanation: Polyester ek thermoplastic fiber hai, jise heat-set karke uski shape maintain ki ja sakti hai.

questions.question: Olefin (Polypropylene) fibers ki main application area kya hai due to their water-repellent nature and low density?

options.C: Outdoor furniture fabrics and sportswear base layers

questions.explanation: Olefin fibers water-repellent hote hain aur lightweight hote hain, isliye outdoor fabrics, sportswear aur carpets mein use hote hain.

questions.question: Yarn kya hota hai?
questions.explanation: Yarn fibers ke twisted strands hote hain jinse fabric banaya jata hai.

questions.question: Spun yarns kaise banate hain?

options.A: Long continuous filaments ko twist karke
options.B: Short staple fibers ko twist karke
options.C: Fibers ko chemical process se dissolve karke

questions.explanation: Spun yarns short staple fibers ko twist karke banate hain, jaise cotton ya wool.

questions.question: Plain weave fabric ki sabse common example kya hai?
questions.explanation: Poplin, muslin, calico plain weave ke common examples hain.

questions.question: Fabric ki GSM (Grams per Square Meter) kya indicate karta hai?

options.C: Fabric ka weight per unit area

questions.explanation: GSM fabric ka weight measure karta hai, jo uski thickness aur density ka indication deta hai.

questions.question: Weaving mein warp threads kaun se direction mein hote hain?
questions.explanation: Warp threads loom par lengthwise (vertical) set kiye jaate hain.

questions.question: Knitting mein fabric kaise banta hai?

options.A: Two sets of yarns ko interlace karke
options.B: Loops of yarn ko interlock karke
options.D: Chemicals se fibers ko bond karke

questions.explanation: Knitting mein ek ya do sets of yarn ke loops ko interlock karke fabric banate hain.

questions.question: Denim fabric kis type ki weave se banta hai?
questions.explanation: Denim ek twill weave fabric hai, jo uski diagonal lines se pehchana jata hai.

questions.question: Jo fabric bina weaving ya knitting ke banate hain, fibers ko bond karke, unhe kya kehte hain?
questions.explanation: Non-woven fabrics fibers ko mechanical, chemical ya thermal methods se bond karke banate hain.

questions.question: Satin weave fabric ki main characteristic kya hai?

options.C: Smooth, lustrous surface with long floats

questions.explanation: Satin weave mein warp ya weft floats zyada hote hain, jisse fabric ki surface smooth aur lustrous dikhti hai.

questions.question: Filament yarns kya hote hain?

options.A: Short, hairy fibers se bane yarns
options.C: Only natural fibers se bane yarns

questions.explanation: Filament yarns continuous long strands se banate hain, jaise silk ya synthetic fibers.

questions.question: Fabric ki grainline kya hoti hai?
questions.explanation: Grainline fabric mein warp threads ki direction ko refer karti hai, jo fabric ki length hoti hai.

questions.question: Rib knit fabric kaise banta hai?

options.B: Alternating knit and purl stitches across a single course

questions.explanation: Rib knit fabrics mein alternating knit aur purl stitches hote hain, jo vertical ribs banate hain aur fabric ko elasticity dete hain.

questions.question: Selvage kya hota hai?

options.B: Fabric ke edges jo fray nahi karte

questions.explanation: Selvage fabric ke self-finished edges hote hain jo fraying se bachate hain.

questions.question: Jacquard weave machine kis type ke fabrics banane ke liye use hoti hai?
questions.explanation: Jacquard loom complex aur intricate patterns wale fabrics banane ke liye use hota hai, jaise brocade ya damask.

questions.question: Interfacing aur lining fabrics ka primary purpose kya hai apparel mein?

options.A: To add color to the garment
options.B: To provide shape, support, and finish

questions.explanation: Interfacing garments ko shape aur support deta hai, jabki lining smooth finish aur comfort provide karti hai.

questions.question: Single jersey knit fabric ki main property kya hai?

options.A: It's very stable and doesn't curl
options.B: It curls at the edges and is stretchy

questions.explanation: Single jersey knit fabric edges par curl hota hai aur usme good stretch hota hai.

questions.question: Terry fabric, jo towels mein commonly use hota hai, kis type ki weave ya knit se banta hai aur uski main property kya hai?
questions.explanation: Terry fabric loop pile weave se banta hai, jismein loops hote hain jo uski high absorbency ke liye responsible hote hain.

questions.question: Fabric ki 'drape' property kya define karti hai?

options.C: Fabric ka body par girne ka tareeka (flow)

questions.explanation: Drape fabric ka soft ya stiff tareeke se body par girna (flow) describe karta hai.

questions.question: Shrinkage control ke liye kaun sa common finish use hota hai?
questions.explanation: Sanforization ek mechanical finish hai jo fabric ko pre-shrinking karta hai taaki baad mein washing ke baad shrinkage kam ho.

questions.question: Fabric ki strength ko kis test se measure kiya jata hai?
questions.explanation: Tensile strength test fabric ko break hone tak kitna force withstand kar sakta hai, woh measure karta hai.

questions.question: Water-repellent finish aur waterproof finish mein kya difference hai?

options.B: Water-repellent pani ko resist karta hai, waterproof completely block karta hai.
options.C: Waterproof pani ko resist karta hai, water-repellent completely block karta hai.
options.D: Water-repellent sirf natural fibers par hota hai, waterproof synthetic par.

questions.explanation: Water-repellent finish pani ko resist karta hai par pores ko block nahi karta, jabki waterproof finish pani ko completely block karta hai, often pores ko seal karke.

questions.question: Pilling kya hota hai aur kis type ke fibers mein zyada hota hai?

options.A: Fabric ka color fade hona, natural fibers mein.
options.B: Fabric surface par small fiber balls ka banna, short-staple synthetic fibers mein.
options.C: Fabric ka stretch hona, knitted fabrics mein.
options.D: Fabric ka stiff hona, woven fabrics mein.

questions.explanation: Pilling mein fabric surface par chote fiber balls ban jaate hain, jo short-staple synthetic fibers mein zyada common hai.

questions.question: Fabric ki 'absorbency' ka matlab kya hai?

options.A: Kitni jaldi woh sookh jata hai.
options.B: Kitna pani woh absorb kar sakta hai.

questions.explanation: Absorbency fabric ki pani ya moisture ko soak karne ki capacity hai.

questions.question: Calendering finish ka main purpose kya hai?

options.C: To smooth and impart luster to fabric surface

questions.explanation: Calendering mein fabric ko heated rollers ke beech se pass kiya jata hai, jisse woh smooth, shiny aur compact ho jata hai.

questions.question: Anti-crease finish fabric ko kis property mein improve karta hai?
questions.explanation: Anti-crease ya wrinkle-resistant finishes fabric ko creasing se bachate hain.

questions.question: Fabric ki 'resilience' ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Kitni jaldi woh pani absorb karta hai.
options.B: Kitni jaldi woh apni original shape mein wapas aata hai deformation ke baad.
options.C: Kitna resist karta hai abrasion ko.
options.D: Kitna resist karta hai chemicals ko.

questions.explanation: Resilience fabric ki property hai ki woh kitni jaldi apni original shape regain karta hai dabav ya deformation ke baad.

questions.question: UV protection finish garments mein kyun use hota hai?

options.B: To protect the wearer from harmful sun rays

questions.explanation: UV protection finish fabric ko harmful ultraviolet rays ko block karne mein help karta hai.

questions.question: Fabric ki 'hand' property kya describe karti hai?
questions.explanation: 'Hand' fabric ke touch aur feel ko describe karta hai, jaise soft, crisp, smooth, rough.

questions.question: Flame-retardant finish ka main purpose kya hai?

options.B: To prevent fabric from catching fire easily

questions.explanation: Flame-retardant finishes fabric ko aag pakadne se bachate hain ya uski aag pakadne ki speed ko kam karte hain.

questions.question: Anti-microbial finish garments mein kis liye use hota hai?

options.B: To prevent odor and growth of bacteria/fungi
options.C: To add shine to the fabric

questions.explanation: Anti-microbial finishes bacteria aur fungi ki growth ko rokte hain, jisse odor control hota hai aur hygiene maintain rehti hai.

questions.question: What does 'colorfastness' mean for a fabric?

options.B: How well the color resists fading or bleeding
options.D: How many colors are in the fabric

questions.explanation: Colorfastness ka matlab hai ki fabric ka color washing, light, ya rubbing se kitna resist karta hai.

questions.question: Embossing finish fabric ko kya deta hai?
questions.explanation: Embossing mein fabric ko heated, engraved rollers ke beech se pass kiya jata hai, jisse uspar raised patterns ban jaate hain.

questions.question: Which property describes how well a fabric resists wear and tear from rubbing?
questions.explanation: Abrasion resistance fabric ki ragad se hone wale wear and tear ko resist karne ki ability hai.

questions.question: Napping process fabric ko kya effect deta hai?

options.B: Creates a soft, fuzzy surface by raising fiber ends

questions.explanation: Napping mein fabric surface par fibers ko raise kiya jata hai, jisse ek soft, fuzzy texture (jaise flannel) banta hai aur garmahat badhti hai.

questions.question: Dyeing kya process hai?
questions.explanation: Dyeing ek process hai jismein fabric ya yarn ko color kiya jata hai.

questions.question: Direct printing method mein pattern kaise apply hota hai?

options.A: Fabric ko dye bath mein dip karke
options.B: Color ko directly fabric par apply karke
options.C: Fabric par resist paste apply karke
options.D: Yarn ko dye karke phir weave karke

questions.explanation: Direct printing mein printing paste jismein dye hota hai, use directly fabric par apply karte hain.

questions.question: Tie-dyeing kis type ki resist dyeing technique hai?

options.C: Fabric ko bandh kar ya knot karke resist create karna

questions.explanation: Tie-dyeing mein fabric ko bandh kar, knot karke ya pleat karke dye kiya jata hai, jisse un-dyed areas resist ho jaate hain.

questions.question: Batik printing mein kaun sa resist material use hota hai?
questions.explanation: Batik printing mein wax ko resist material ke roop mein use karte hain, jise fabric par apply karke dye karte hain. Wax wale areas dye nahi hote.

questions.question: Pigment printing mein color kaise apply hota hai aur uski main property kya hai?

options.A: Dyes fibers ko penetrate karte hain, good colorfastness.
options.B: Pigments surface par bind hote hain, good lightfastness.
options.C: Dyes surface par bind hote hain, poor washfastness.
options.D: Pigments fibers ko penetrate karte hain, poor lightfastness.

questions.explanation: Pigment printing mein color pigments fabric surface par binder ke through adhere hote hain. Inki lightfastness generally achhi hoti hai.

questions.question: Embroidery kya hai?

options.B: Fabric par threads se design banana

questions.explanation: Embroidery fabric par threads (sui-dhaga) se decorative designs banane ki art hai.

questions.question: Yarn dyeing ka example kya hai?
questions.explanation: Checkered fabrics jaise gingham mein yarns ko pehle dye kiya jata hai, phir unhe weave karke pattern banaya jata hai.

questions.question: Screen printing mein design kaise transfer hota hai fabric par?

options.B: Stencil screen aur squeegee se ink push karke

questions.explanation: Screen printing mein ek mesh screen (stencil) use hota hai, jiske through ink ko squeegee se press karke fabric par transfer kiya jata hai.

questions.question: Discharge printing kya hai?

options.A: Fabric par naya color add karna.
options.B: Pehle se dyed fabric se color remove karke pattern banana.
options.C: Fabric ko resist material se cover karna.

questions.explanation: Discharge printing mein pehle se dyed fabric par chemical paste apply karte hain jo dye ko remove karke light ya white pattern create karta hai.

questions.question: Block printing mein design kaise banta hai?

options.B: Hand-carved wooden blocks se ink stamp karke

questions.explanation: Block printing ek traditional method hai jismein hand-carved wooden blocks par dye ya ink lagakar fabric par stamp karte hain.

questions.question: Appliqué kya hai?

options.B: Fabric ke chote pieces ko bade fabric par stitch karke design banana

questions.explanation: Appliqué mein ek fabric ke pieces ko dusre fabric par stitch ya glue karke design banate hain.

questions.question: Digital printing ki main advantage kya hai textile industry mein?

options.A: Very low cost for bulk production
options.C: Unlimited color options and intricate designs with low minimums

questions.explanation: Digital printing intricate designs, unlimited colors aur low minimum order quantities ke liye best hai.

questions.question: Sequins kis type ki embellishment hain?
questions.explanation: Sequins chote, chamakdar, disc-shaped decorative items hote hain jo garments par stitch kiye jaate hain.

questions.question: Resist dyeing mein, resist agent ka kya role hota hai?

options.A: Dye ko fabric par spread hone mein help karna.
options.B: Dye ko fabric ke certain areas mein penetrate hone se rokna.

questions.explanation: Resist agent (jaise wax, paste, knots) fabric ke kuch areas ko dye se protect karta hai, jisse pattern banta hai.

questions.question: Garment dyeing ka matlab kya hai?

options.A: Fabric ko dye karna uske cut hone se pehle.
options.B: Fabric ko dye karna uske stitch hone se pehle.
options.C: Pure bane hue garment ko dye karna.

questions.explanation: Garment dyeing mein pura finished garment hi dye kiya jata hai.

questions.question: Zardozi embroidery mein kya use hota hai?

options.B: Metallic threads, beads, and precious stones

questions.explanation: Zardozi ek elaborate embroidery technique hai jismein metallic threads, beads, aur precious stones use hote hain.

questions.question: Care label par 'Hand Wash' symbol ka kya matlab hai?

options.C: Garment ko haath se dhona hai

questions.explanation: Hand Wash symbol ka matlab hai ki garment ko haath se gently dhona chahiye.

questions.question: Ironing symbol par agar cross laga ho, toh uska kya matlab hai?
questions.explanation: Cross laga hua ironing symbol indicate karta hai ki garment ko iron nahi karna chahiye.

questions.question: Fabric quality control mein 'Shade Variation' kya check karta hai?
questions.explanation: Shade variation check karta hai ki fabric roll ya different fabric batches mein color consistency hai ya nahi.

questions.question: AQL (Acceptable Quality Level) ka kya role hai textile industry mein?

options.B: Quality inspection mein permissible number of defects define karna.
options.C: Fabric ki production speed measure karna.

questions.explanation: AQL ek statistical tool hai jo quality control mein permissible defects ki limit set karta hai, jiske andar product ko accept kiya jata hai.

questions.question: Fabric inspection ke liye commonly kaun sa method use hota hai?
questions.explanation: Four-point system fabric inspection ke liye commonly use hota hai, jismein fabric defects ko points diye jaate hain.

questions.question: 'Do Not Bleach' symbol kya indicate karta hai?

options.D: Bleach ko dilute karke use karein

questions.explanation: 'Do Not Bleach' symbol ka matlab hai ki garment par kisi bhi type ka bleach use nahi karna chahiye.

questions.question: Textile industry mein 'sustainability' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Environmentally friendly aur socially responsible practices use karna.

questions.explanation: Sustainability ka matlab hai ki production process mein environmental impact kam ho aur social responsibility maintain ho.

questions.question: Organic cotton kis type ki farming se produce hota hai?

options.A: Chemical fertilizers aur pesticides ke saath

questions.explanation: Organic cotton bina harmful chemicals aur pesticides ke natural methods se cultivate kiya jata hai.

questions.question: Circular economy principles textile industry mein kaise apply hote hain?

options.A: Products ko banane ke baad dispose kar dena.
options.B: Products ko design karna taaki unhe reuse, repair, aur recycle kiya ja sake.
options.C: Sirf naye raw materials use karna.

questions.explanation: Circular economy mein products ko is tarah design kiya jata hai ki unhe life cycle ke end mein waste na karke dobara use, repair ya recycle kiya ja sake.

questions.question: Fabric defects jaise 'Slub' ya 'Hole' ko quality control mein kya consider kiya jata hai?
questions.explanation: Slub (agar excessive ho) ya hole jaise defects fabric ki appearance aur functionality ko severely affect karte hain, isliye major defects hain.

questions.question: Fabric ke 'shrinkage' ko avoid karne ke liye care label par kya instruction ho sakti hai?
questions.explanation: Cold wash aur line dry shrinkage ko minimize karne mein help karte hain.

questions.question: Upcycling textiles ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Old clothes ko naye, higher-value products mein transform karna.
options.C: Old clothes ko melt karke naye fibers banana.

questions.explanation: Upcycling mein waste materials ko aise products mein convert karte hain jinki quality ya value original se zyada ho.

questions.question: 'Dry Clean Only' care label ka matlab kya hai?

options.A: Garment ko machine mein dhona hai
options.B: Garment ko sirf dry cleaning process se saaf karna hai
options.C: Garment ko haath se dhona hai
options.D: Garment ko sirf air dry karna hai

questions.explanation: 'Dry Clean Only' ka matlab hai ki garment ko water-based washing ki jagah chemical solvents se dry clean karana hai.

questions.question: Zero-waste pattern cutting ka primary goal kya hai?

options.B: Fabric waste ko minimize karte hue patterns cut karna.

questions.explanation: Zero-waste pattern cutting ek technique hai jismein garment patterns ko is tarah se lay out kiya jata hai ki fabric cutting ke baad koi waste na bache.

questions.question: Oeko-Tex Standard 100 certification kis baat ki guarantee deta hai?

options.B: Fabric sustainable methods se bana hai.
options.C: Fabric harmful substances se free hai.

questions.explanation: Oeko-Tex Standard 100 certify karta hai ki textile products aur unke components (dyes, threads) harmful substances se free hain.

questions.question: Fabric ki 'pilling' ko kam karne ke liye kya karna chahiye?

options.C: Gentle washing aur garment ko andar se bahar karke dhona

questions.explanation: Gentle washing aur garment ko andar se bahar karke dhone se pilling ko reduce kiya ja sakta hai.
